ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, OECD) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student belongs to */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., multiple-choice, essay) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the assessment (e.g., mathematics, reading) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible in the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks allocated to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the option is correct or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who provided the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "score" REAL /* Score awarded to the response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the score */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade awarded to the student */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage score achieved by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oecd_assessments" (
  "oecd_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OECD assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the OECD assessment belongs to */,
  "oecd_country" TEXT /* Country where the OECD assessment was administered */,
  "oecd_year" INTEGER /* Year the OECD assessment was administered */,
  "oecd_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student in the OECD assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oecd_assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_oecd_assessments" (
  "non_oecd_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-OECD assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the non-OECD assessment belongs to */,
  "non_oecd_country" TEXT /* Country where the non-OECD assessment was administered */,
  "non_oecd_year" INTEGER /* Year the non-OECD assessment was administered */,
  "non_oecd_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student in the non-OECD assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_oecd_assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pv_scores" (
  "pv_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plausible value score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the plausible value score */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the plausible value score belongs to */,
  "pv_score" REAL /* Plausible value score achieved by the student */,
  "pv_score_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the plausible value score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pv_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pv_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pv_scores_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessment_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the metadata belongs to */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the metadata belongs to */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* CNT value for the student's assessment */,
  "oecd" TEXT /* OECD country code for the student's assessment */,
  "schoolid" INTEGER /* School ID for the student's assessment */,
  "stidstd" INTEGER /* STIDSTD value for the student's assessment */,
  "st01q01" INTEGER /* ST01Q01 value for the student's assessment */,
  "st03q01" INTEGER /* ST03Q01 value for the student's assessment */,
  "st03q02" INTEGER /* ST03Q02 value for the student's assessment */,
  "st04q01" TEXT /* ST04Q01 value for the student's assessment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_metadata_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessment_metadata_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator, system administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the subject belongs to */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_subjects_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_topics_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the difficulty level belongs to */,
  "difficulty_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_difficulty_levels_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
